mapper.insert: INSERT INTO price_snapshots (asset_id, snapshot_date, price, currency, source, fetched_at) VALUES (#{assetId}, #{snapshotDate}, #{price}, #{currency}, #{source}, #{fetchedAt})
mapper.select: SELECT id, asset_id, snapshot_date, price, currency, source, fetched_at FROM price_snapshots WHERE asset_id = #{assetId} ORDER BY fetched_at DESC LIMIT 1
